troparion.text:
(Podoben: “Awed by the beauty of your virginity...”)
Let us adorn the phalanx of Martyrs with garlands of songs:  /  Thyrsos, Philḗmon, steadfast Apollonios,  /  Arrian, Kallinikos, and the glorious Leukios,  /  for they overthrew the Enemy, and are pillars of piety.  /   Together they illumine the world with the radiance of heavenly grace.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You appeared today...”)
Let us gather today,  / and praise the luminaries of the Church,  / acclaiming them as prize-winners of Christ our God.

saints.name: Martyrs Philemon, Apollonios, Arrian, and Theonas of Alexandria

troparion.text:
(Podoben: “Awed by the beauty of your virginity...”)
Let us adorn the phalanx of Martyrs with garlands of songs:  / Thyrsos, Philḗmon, steadfast Apollonios,  /  Arrian, Kallinikos, and the glorious Leukios,  /  for they overthrew the Enemy, and are pillars of piety.  /  Together they illumine the world with the radiance of heavenly grace.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You appeared today...”)
Let us gather today,   /  and praise the luminaries of the Church,   /  acclaiming them as prize-winners
of Christ our God

saints.name: Saint Hilarion, Metropolitan of Suzdal and Yuriev

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Hilarion, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.
